sglang.title: [BUG] Refactor task resolution logic in benchmark function for multimodal generation
sglang.author: zijiexia
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the current bench_serving.py, the --task argument is ignored when setting task_name. The code will use HuggingFace pipeline_tag as source of truth, and in the case for MOVA-720P, it is any-to-any and doesn't match any tasks we have. The benchmark run will fail. For more details please

sglang.title: [Fix] Add lora tied lm head support (for Qwen2.5, Gemma, etc model need)
sglang.author: yushengsu-thu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Added test ci: 324 lines
Modified code in sgl: 87 lines
When tie_word_embeddings=True (e.g., Qwen2.5, Gemma), the model's lm_head is the same Python object as embed_tokens. PyTorch's named_modules() deduplicates by object identity, so lm_head never appears as a separate module — LoRA cann

When scheduling fails after init_next_round_input has already performed COW allocation, freeing the mamba pool slot causes states to be reconstructed from the radi

sglang.title: [AMD]  Fix mi35x dsv32 mtp nightly
sglang.author: bingxche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

PR #17554 introduced fused_metadata_copy, a JIT-compiled CUDA kernel enabled by default. This kernel cannot run on ROCm/HIP — it fails on every CUDA graph replay iteration, printing warning logs and falling back to individual tensor.copy_() ops.
This repeated failure likely contributes t

sglang.title: Add batched zero copy to NIXL backend
sglang.author: hxieustc
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Current NIXL backend does not support zero copy (NIXL library does support zero copy though, however, NIXL integration for HiCache does not implement zero copy yet). This PR adds zero copy support for NIXL integration with HiCache.
This PR can boost the performance of NIXL storage backend si
